channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Swift (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Swift nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 darrylmorley/whatcable (2059 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: darrylmorley

📝 Repository: darrylmorley/whatcable

📄 Descrizione: macOS menu bar app that tells you, in plain English, what each USB-C cable plugged into your Mac can actually do

⭐ Stelle: 2059

🍴 Forks: 42

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: apple-silicon hardware-info iokit mac-app macos menubar menubar-app swift swiftui thunderbolt usb-c usb-power-delivery utility

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-01T07:45:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-07T04:01:19Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: tddworks

item.description:
👤 Owner: awizemann

📝 Repository: awizemann/harness

🍴 Forks: 6

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

item.title: 📝 a110q/CodexSessionKeeper (11 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: a110q

📝 Repository: a110q/CodexSessionKeeper

📄 Descrizione: codex_会话管理：给 Codex 用户的会话备份与恢复工具 如果你经常切换 Codex 的模型供应商、账号或本地配置，可能遇到过一个很麻烦的问题：之前的对话突然找不到了，历史会话断掉，重要上下文丢失。 codex_会话管理 就是为了解决这个问题做的本地工具。它可以帮你管理、备份、恢复和清理 Codex 会话，让你在频繁切换账号、模型供应商或环境配置时，也能把重要对话稳稳保留下来

⭐ Stelle: 11

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-08T19:01:59Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-13T12:46:34Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:

📝 Repository: AstroQore/vibe-bar

📄 Descrizione: Native macOS menu-bar app for Codex and Claude Code users to monitor subscription quota, usage pace, local token cost, and service status.

item.title: 📝 portwally/1977 (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: portwally

📝 Repository: portwally/1977

📄 Descrizione: Convert images to retro text-mode ASCII art for ten classic platforms — Apple II, Commodore, Atari, ZX Spectrum, Amiga, MS-DOS — with native fonts, hardware palettes, and a live crop tool. macOS / SwiftUI.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: amiga apple2 ascii atari atari-st commodore-128 commodore-64 converter graphics macos ms-dos petscii retro-computing swiftui vic-20 zx-spectrum

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-02T22:09:59Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-07T18:49:38Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
